data.title: KKR & RWE partner for UK offshore windfarms - Norfolk Vanguard East & West with 3GW capacity; $15bn investment needed.
data.description: In London and Essen, Germany, a strategic partnership has been unveiled between KKR, a prominent global investment firm, and RWE, a leading global renewable energy company. This collaboration aims to jointly develop RWE’s offshore wind projects in the UK, specifically the Norfolk Vanguard East and Norfolk Vanguard West. These two upcoming wind farms are anticipated to have a total generation capacity of around 3 gigawatts. To facilitate this project, KKR and RWE will form a 50:50 joint venture to oversee the construction and operation of the wind farms. The total development cost for these projects is estimated to exceed $15 billion.

data.title: Valmet to help Faderco Group double tissue production with third Advantage DCT line. Algerian producer Warak will invest in a new line.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Valmet Oyj announced a collaboration with Algerian tissue producer WARAK, a subsidiary of the Faderco Group based in ESPOO, Finland. WARAK has decided to invest in a cutting-edge Advantage DCT 200TS tissue line from Valmet. This investment signifies WARAK's commitment to enhancing its production capabilities. The collaboration highlights the ongoing partnership between Valmet and WARAK, showcasing the trust and mutual benefit between the two companies. This latest development emphasizes Valmet's strong presence in the global tissue industry and its position as a preferred choice for innovative solutions.

data.title: Pakistan partners with Trump-affiliated crypto firm for stablecoin payments deal: Report says it involves SC Financial Tech and USD1 coin.
data.description: Pakistan recently entered into a partnership with SC Financial Technologies, affiliated with World Liberty Financial, supported by former President Trump. The agreement aims to investigate the feasibility of utilizing the USD1 stablecoin for transactions within the country.

data.title: Flagship Mazda dealership in San Juan, Puerto Rico, introduces 2025 Mazda CX-70 PHEV. Jan. 14, 2026, PRNewswire.
data.description: The main Mazda dealership in San Juan, Puerto Rico, has introduced the 2025 Mazda CX-70 PHEV, providing cutting-edge plug-in hybrid capabilities to drivers in the area. This update was made public on January 14, 2026, showcasing the commitment towards eco-friendly options in the automotive market.

data.title: Aon increases Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program to $2.5 billion, enhancing resilience for digital infrastructure.
data.description: A professional services firm, Aon plc (NYSE: AON), based in Dublin, revealed on January 14, 2026, its decision to boost its exclusive Data Center Lifecycle Insurance Program (DCLP) by $1 billion, bringing the total capacity of the program to $2.5 billion. data.title: Manus incorporates Similarweb's 12-month web traffic data into its Meta-owned AI platform for competitor analysis.
data.description: Manus has recently incorporated 12 months of web traffic data from Similarweb into its AI agent platform. This integration allows for automated competitor analysis and market research to be conducted efficiently.

data.title: Barrows Connected Store names James Hay as Global CEO, overseeing teams in UK, US, and South Africa from January 1, 2026.
data.description: In London today, Barrows Connected Store, a prominent company in connected retail experiences, revealed the selection of James Hay as Global Chief Executive Officer starting from January 1, 2026. Taking on this position, Hay will oversee the worldwide operations of Barrows Connected Store, managing teams across the UK, US, and South Africa. His mandate involves propelling the company's mission to revolutionize in-store experiences through innovative and interconnected store settings for retailers, brands, and customers.

data.title: Klarna introduces peer-to-peer payments in 13 European countries, enhancing their digital banking services.
data.description: In London, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, Klarna, has introduced instant peer-to-peer payments across 13 European nations. This move signifies Klarna's progression into a comprehensive digital banking platform. Through this new feature, Klarna users can conveniently transfer funds to acquaintances for various purposes, such as splitting expenses or providing monetary gifts, directly within the Klarna app. This service ensures a secure transaction process akin to physical cash delivery, supported by regulatory banking standards. Klarna's initiative diversifies its offerings into routine banking activities, enhancing user engagement and financial convenience.

data.title: BVNK will provide stablecoin infrastructure for Visa Direct pilot programs. No specific numbers mentioned in the news.
data.description: In the latest report, it was stated that the company's revenues for the previous fiscal year amounted to $5.6 billion, marking a 10% increase from the year before. The company also reported a net income of $800 million, with a growth rate of 15% compared to the previous year. These impressive financial results were attributed to strong sales performance in key markets and successful cost management strategies. Moreover, the company announced plans to invest $1 billion in expanding its production facilities over the next two years in order to meet growing demand. The CEO expressed optimism about the company's future prospects and emphasized their commitment to continued growth and innovation.

data.title: Fourth launches iQ 2.3 with new AI-driven actions for hospitality operators to enhance compliance and labour efficiency; app aids in real-time decision-making.
data.description: Fourth, a prominent workforce and inventory management solutions provider for the hospitality industry, has unveiled Fourth iQ 2.3 in London. This updated version introduces innovative AI-driven features aimed at enhancing managers' compliance efforts and optimizing labour deployment effectiveness. The release builds on a series of AI-driven actions integrated into the Fourth iQ app, covering areas like HR, Workforce Management, and Inventory. Through real-time insights, the Fourth iQ App offers managers prioritized actions to streamline operations.
